overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage transitioning from on-foot exploration at a neon-lit street corner to driving through a futuristic multi-level highway system at night. The clip features dense cyberpunk architecture with Japanese signage, holographic advertisements, and elevated expressways.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit street corner with hotel and commercial buildings

events.description: camera pans left revealing BD SHOP building and outdoor seating area
camera pans back right toward the hotel sign and intersection

multi-level highway overpass with red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic street corner dominated by a blue neon hotel sign. The camera pans left to reveal the BD SHOP building with outdoor seating, then returns to the original view. Sparse pedestrians and parked vehicles are visible near the crosswalk.

events.description: perspective shifts from on-foot to vehicle mounted, entering the highway underpass
vehicle approaches and stops at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving through the multi-level highway system, navigating under neon-lit overpasses

notable_agents.action: black car ahead driving through the underpass

entered.detail: red rectangular sign with 'Holly' text on the overpass
tall cylindrical building covered in digital advertisements
large holographic advertisement projection on the left side of road
bridge connecting two skyscrapers in the distance
concrete barrier with red neon strip along the right side

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a vehicle driving through a multi-level highway system. The car navigates under massive concrete overpasses illuminated by red and green neon lights. A cylindrical advertising tower stands on the left as the vehicle approaches a red traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic advertising displays

events.description: traffic light turns green, vehicle accelerates through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light observing holographic advertisements, then accelerating through the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi crossing the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: ground-level holographic display showing changing advertisement content
bright yellow taxi cab crossing the intersection
tall building covered in large digital screens showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light in a wide intersection, observing a nearby holographic advertisement stand displaying changing content. As the light turns green, the car accelerates through the crosswalk, passing a yellow taxi and continuing under the elevated highway structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a static street-level observation of a neon-lit corner to a high-speed drive through a multi-level highway system. It begins by panning across a futuristic street corner dominated by a blue neon hotel sign and the outdoor seating of a BD SHOP building. The perspective then shifts seamlessly into a vehicle navigating beneath massive concrete overpasses illuminated by red and green neon lights, passing a cylindrical advertising tower. As the car reaches a wide intersection, the scene lingers on a holographic advertisement stand while waiting at a red light. Finally, the vehicle accelerates through the crosswalk past a yellow taxi, disappearing further under the sprawling elevated highway structures.
